shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
The side panel uses dark slate housing, cream labels, and teal slots.
differences: The plate reserves two 80x80px next slots and one 80x80px hold slot.
Rounded bubble corner details make the queue panel feel friendly rather than industrial.
The hold slot uses a stronger accent frame than the passive next queue.

context.usage: Left-side plate that presents the next queue and hold storage.

specs.shading: Flat panel fill with bright inner slot rims.

acceptance_criteria: Panel texture size is exactly 240x320px with two visible next slots and one hold slot.
Each slot interior measures exactly 80x80px and leaves clear breathing room.
The hold frame remains visually stronger than the next frames.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_gameplay_balance
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 9x7 board, balance axis, route overlay, and HUD placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: ImageBundle plate with child slot and caption nodes.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_next_hold_panel_240x320.png during the Loading state and bind slot child nodes for queue updates.
runtime_notes: Keep slot item sprites separate from the plate texture.
Dim the hold slot through UI state rather than alternate art.
